# utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics { #ammonyte.utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics }

```python
utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics(
    precision,
    recall,
    f1_score,
    true_positives,
    false_positives,
    false_negatives,
    n_detected,
    n_ground_truth,
    tolerance,
)
```

Container for transition detection evaluation metrics

Stores precision, recall, F1 score, and detailed counts from comparing
detected transitions against ground truth.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**precision**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Precision score (TP / (TP + FP))

<code>[**recall**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Recall score (TP / (TP + FN))

<code>[**f1_score**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   F1 score (harmonic mean of precision and recall)

<code>[**true_positives**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Number of correct detections

<code>[**false_positives**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Number of incorrect detections

<code>[**false_negatives**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Number of missed ground truth events

<code>[**n_detected**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total number of detections

<code>[**n_ground_truth**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total number of ground truth events

<code>[**tolerance**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Maximum distance for matching detected to ground truth

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [to_dict](#ammonyte.utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics.to_dict) | Convert metrics to dictionary. |

### to_dict { #ammonyte.utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics.to_dict }

```python
utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics.to_dict()
```

Convert metrics to dictionary.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Dictionary containing all metrics.
